creator: sanpei@sanpei.org
text:
I'm maintainer of math/ngraph.

distfile(Ngraph-6.3.05-src) was removed in mastersites.
So I mirrored distfile to MASTER_SITE_PORTS_JP(OKed by
original author of Ngraph, Satoshi Ishizaka
<isizaka@msa.biglobe.ne.jp>).

Please commit below change to ngraph.

Thank you.

P.S.
I will port newer version of Ngraph, Ngraph-6.3.06-src, if I have
time.
